scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client

game.author: Mason
game.title: The 15 Puzzle
game.description: Sliding-tile 15 puzzle with built-in scrambles, community puzzles, custom tile/board images, leaderboard, and an IDA* auto-solver.
